---
title: "Making of the Modern World"
page-layout: article
---

# Making of the Modern World

## Description

Digital archive of economic and business literature published from 1450 through 1850. Supports historical research on commerce, political economy, and social thought.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Historical Archives

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb859)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
